title: senecio kingii
intro: Senecio kingii, also known as King's Senecio, is a plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its tall, herbaceous stems and clusters of yellow or white flowers. Traditionally, Senecio kingii has been used in folk medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, derived from its chemical constituents such as sesquiterpene lactones and saponins. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and reducing swelling. Senecio kingii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
